title: Font Horizontal Scale Factor (0x5D)
description: Layout for triplet 0x5D: horizontal scale factor for fonts. Tlength and Tid (offsets 0 and 1) are omitted from this mapping.
notes: Offsets are relative to the triplet start. Tlength and Tid are not represented here.

elements.name: Hscale
elements.description: Horizontal scale factor in 1/1440ths of an inch (UBIN, 2 bytes). Valid range 1–32767.
